title: tigridia alpestris
intro: Tigridia alpestris is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the Mexican tiger flower. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Tigridia alpestris include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving wound healing. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
